REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANT DIMITRI RIGOPOULOS, CHRISTOS RIGOPOULOS, THE RIGOPOULOS GROUP, INC., VANGUARD PROPERTIES, INC. NOTICE OF DEMURRER AND DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT; MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND FOR PLAINTIFF TO ADDRESS IN GOOD FAITH ALL ISSUES RAISED BY THE DEMURRER. THE COURT NOTES THAT SOME ARGUMENTS ADVANCED IN THE MOVING PAPERS ARE NOT ADDRESSED IN THE OPPOSITION, SUGGESTING THAT PLAINTIFF BELIEVES THEM TO BE WELL-TAKEN. THEREFORE, PLAINTIFF SHALL ADDRESS THOSE ISSUES IN THE AMENDED COMPLAINT. THE PLAINTIFF SHALL HAVE THE FINAL LEAVE TO AMEND TO ALLEGE FACTS SUPPORTING NON-SPECULATIVE DAMAGES. ALLEGATIONS CURRENTLY CONTAINED IN PARAGRAPHS 39, 47, 55 AND 61 ARE CONCLUSORY AND SPECULATIVE. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312(B). JUDGE: CHARLES F. HAINES; CLERK: VANESSA WU; NOT REPORTED. (D501)

Notice Of Demurrer And Demurrer To First Amended Complaint; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
Off Calendar May-01-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

DEFENDANT DIMITRI RIGOPOULOS, CHRISTOS RIGOPOULOS, THE RIGOPOULOS GROUP, INC., VANGUARD PROPERTIES, INC. NOTICE OF DEMURRER AND DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT; MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES is SUSTAINED with leave to amend for Plaintiff to address in good faith all issues raised by the demurrer. The Court notes that some arguments advanced in the moving papers are not addressed in the opposition, suggesting that Plaintiff believes them to be well-taken. Therefore, Plaintiff shall address those issues in the amended complaint. The Plaintiff shall have the final leave to amend to allege facts supporting non-speculative damages. Allegations currently contained in paragraphs 39, 47, 55 and 61 are conclusory and speculative.

Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Vanessa Wu; Not Reported. (D501)
